name: alarm-clock
what_shapes_are_visible: A circle, two short arcs on top, and two horizontal lines at the bottom.
what_ui_actions_or_concepts_does_this_re: Time management, reminders, scheduling, waking up, alerts.

name: ad
what_shapes_are_visible: A rectangle with rounded corners containing the letters 'A' and 'D'.
what_real_world_object_does_this_depict: This resembles an advertisement or ad banner.
what_ui_actions_or_concepts_does_this_re: Displaying advertisements, marketing campaigns, promoting products, monetizing content, advertising partnerships.

name: airplay
what_shapes_are_visible: A rectangle with rounded corners at the top and a triangle pointing downward at the bottom.
what_real_world_object_does_this_depict: It resembles a streaming or casting device interface.
what_ui_actions_or_concepts_does_this_re: Stream content, Cast to device, Screen sharing, Mirroring display, Device connectivity

name: alarm-clock-check
what_shapes_are_visible: One large circle, two small arcs at the top, two small rectangles on the sides, and one check mark inside the circle.
what_real_world_object_does_this_depict: An alarm clock with a check mark symbolizing completed tasks.
what_ui_actions_or_concepts_does_this_re: Set reminder, task completed, notification, due date, checklist item.

name: activity
what_shapes_are_visible: A zigzag line alternating between peaks and valleys, creating a waveform-like pattern.
what_real_world_object_does_this_depict: It resembles a heart rate monitor signal or audio waveform.
what_ui_actions_or_concepts_does_this_re: Track activity, monitor health, represent sound wave, visualize motion, indicate pulse, show intensity.

name: a-arrow-up
what_shapes_are_visible: Two uppercase letter A's, one larger and above the other, with an upward arrow.
what_real_world_object_does_this_depict: It resembles a text formatting option for increasing font size.
what_ui_actions_or_concepts_does_this_re: Text enlargement, increasing font size, typography adjustment, formatting options, enhancing readability

name: accessibility
what_shapes_are_visible: Curved lines forming a circle, straight lines for the figure and wheelchair, a circle for the head.
what_real_world_object_does_this_depict: It depicts a person in a wheelchair.
what_ui_actions_or_concepts_does_this_re: Accessibility features, disability support, inclusion, mobility aid, ADA compliance.

name: a-large-small
what_shapes_are_visible: Two stylized letter 'A's in different sizes, one larger above a smaller one.
what_real_world_object_does_this_depict: The icon resembles typography or font size adjustment.
what_ui_actions_or_concepts_does_this_re: Change font size, text formatting, typography options, accessibility features.

name: a-arrow-down
what_shapes_are_visible: A stylized letter 'A' with a downward arrow integrated into the design, featuring sharp lines and circular ends.
what_real_world_object_does_this_depict: A letter representation combined with a downward pointing arrow.
what_ui_actions_or_concepts_does_this_re: Text formatting, change font size, decrease font size, make text smaller, adjust typography.

name: air-vent
what_shapes_are_visible: A rectangle with rounded corners, a horizontal bar in the center, and two curved shapes below the rectangle.
what_real_world_object_does_this_depict: It resembles an air conditioning unit or air vent.
what_ui_actions_or_concepts_does_this_re: Cooling, temperature control, air circulation, climate adjustment, HVAC functionality
